calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Post Bond On Appeal
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Cuadra, Esq. (415-426-3502) for Plaintiff/moving party Kathleen Needham.
Jill Cohoe, Esq. (415-217-6990) for Defendant/opposing party through Court Call.

The Court calls related cases Line 1 and Line 2 simultaneously. The Court informs Counsel a case was cited yesterday during an ex parte hearing and found that the case has nothing to do with the issue in front of the Court. ARGUED. Plaintiff argues there is no bond requirement since there is a substantive bond on the other matter, attorney's fees are incidental. Defendant argues no standing, argument not in papers, statute is clear on what needs to be posted, if the Court wants a brief they can file a supplemental, the relief Plaintiff seeks is not in their papers.The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN NEEDHAM's Motion To Post Bond On Appeal is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
